name: Crab Rangoon
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Can crab meat, drained and flaked
2 Green onions with tops, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients except won ton skins and vegetable spray coating; mix until well blended.
2. To prevent won ton skins from drying out, prepare one or two Rangoons at a time.
3. Place 1 teaspoon of filling in the center of each won ton skin.
4. Moisten the edges with water and fold them over to form a triangle shape, pressing the edges together to seal.
5. Pull the bottom corners down and slightly overlap; moisten one corner and press to seal.
6. Lightly spray a baking sheet with vegetable coating.
7. Arrange Rangoons on the sheet and lightly spray to coat.
8. Bake in a 425°F oven for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown. Serve hot with sweet-sour sauce or mustard sauce. Makes 48 appetizers.
